positive: A minimalist, stylized graphic design of a majestic constellation forming the shape of a mountain range and a single crescent moon. The style is clean geometric line art combined with cosmic glow effects, reminiscent of Art Deco celestial maps. Central composition, high contrast black and deep indigo on a cream background. Use repeating, small dot patterns (stipple effect) to fill the constellation areas, giving a starry texture. The composition should be contained within a central circular or square motif, suitable for repeating apparel printing. Perfect silhouette, crisp linework, highly detailed yet simple.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, low detail, messy, complex background, realistic photo, painting, signature, low resolution
